title: Personal Finance & Investment Clarity Hub for Notion
description:
Stop juggling brokerage apps, dusty spreadsheets, and mental math. The Personal Finance & Investment Clarity Hub is an all-in-one Notion template that gives you a crystal-clear view of your money — investments, income, expenses, dividends, and net worth — in a single, beautifully organized workspace.

Track every stock, ETF, crypto position, and real estate holding with automatic ROI and unrealized gain calculations. Log every dividend and distribution received. Set monthly budgets by category and measure actual spending against your targets. Record all income streams — salary, freelance, rental, dividends — in one place. Define meaningful financial goals and watch your progress grow.

Built for the everyday investor who is comfortable with Notion but tired of financial chaos. Whether you're building wealth from scratch or managing a growing portfolio, this template gives you the structure and insight to make smarter money decisions — without needing a financial advisor or complex software.

8 interconnected databases. Automated formulas for ROI, progress tracking, and net worth. A central dashboard that answers the three questions that matter most: How much have I invested? How much have I made? And where does my money actually go?
